title: FroxelMC's Custom Orbs
description: FroxelMC’s Custom Orbs is a visual enhancement resource pack that redesigns Minecraft’s experience orbs with brighter colors, smoother shapes, and a more polished glow, making XP collection feel more rewarding and visually pleasing. The pack is carefully c
body:
✨ FroxelMC’s Custom Orbs ✨
A clean and stylish texture pack that completely reimagines Minecraft’s orbs with a modern and satisfying look.

This pack replaces the default experience orbs with custom-designed, high-quality visuals that feel smoother, clearer, and more immersive while staying true to the vanilla style. Perfect for players who want a fresh visual upgrade without changing the core Minecraft feel.

🔮 Features

Custom-designed XP orbs

Clean, smooth, and eye-pleasing visuals

Vanilla-friendly style (not overdone)

Lightweight & performance-friendly

Works great with shaders and PvP packs

🎮 Why use this pack?

If you’re tired of the default orbs and want something that looks cleaner, more modern, and more satisfying, this pack is for you. Small change, big visual difference.

💚 Made with care by FroxelMC
Enjoy a fresh Minecraft experience—one orb at a time.
